title: Web and Digital Interface Designers
description: Design digital user interfaces or websites. Develop and test layouts, interfaces, functionality, and navigation menus to ensure compatibility and usability across browsers or devices. May use web framework applications as well as client-side code and processes. May evaluate web design following web and accessibility standards, and may analyze web use metrics and optimize websites for marketability and search engine ranking. May design and test interfaces that facilitate the human-computer interaction and maximize the usability of digital devices, websites, and software with a focus on aesthetics and design. May create graphics used in websites and manage website content and links.

tasks.text: Collaborate with management or users to develop e-commerce strategies and to integrate these strategies with Web sites.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Collaborate with web development professionals, such as front-end or back-end developers, to complete the full scope of Web development projects.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Communicate with network personnel or Web site hosting agencies to address hardware or software issues affecting Web sites.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Conduct user research to determine design requirements and analyze user feedback to improve design quality.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Confer with management or development teams to prioritize needs, resolve conflicts, develop content criteria, or choose solutions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Create searchable indices for Web page content.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Create Web models or prototypes that include physical, interface, logical, or data models.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Design, build, or maintain Web sites, using authoring or scripting languages, content creation tools, management tools, and digital media.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop and document style guidelines for Web site content.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop new visual design concepts and modify concepts based on stakeholder feedback.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop or implement procedures for ongoing Web site revision.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop system interaction or sequence diagrams.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop Web site maps, application models, image templates, or page templates that meet project goals, user needs, or industry standards.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop, validate, and document test routines and schedules to ensure that test cases mimic external interfaces and address all browser and device types.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct and execute pre-production activities, such as creating moodboards or storyboards and establishing a project timeline.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Document technical factors such as server load, bandwidth, database performance, and browser and device types.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Identify or maintain links to and from other Web sites and check links to ensure proper functioning.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Identify problems uncovered by testing or customer feedback, and correct problems or refer problems to appropriate personnel for correction.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Incorporate technical considerations into Web site design plans, such as budgets, equipment, performance requirements, or legal issues including accessibility and privacy.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Maintain understanding of current Web technologies or programming practices through continuing education, reading, or participation in professional conferences, workshops, or groups.
tasks.rationale: Software coding, programming, or application development task highly susceptible to automated generation.

tasks.text: Perform or direct Web site updates.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform Web site tests according to planned schedules, or after any Web site or product revision.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide clear, detailed descriptions of Web site specifications, such as product features, activities, software, communication protocols, programming languages, and operating systems software and hardware.
tasks.rationale: Software coding, programming, or application development task highly susceptible to automated generation.

tasks.text: Register Web sites with search engines to increase Web site traffic.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Research and apply innovative solutions for product design, visuals, and user experience to meet the needs of individual Web development projects.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Research, document, rate, or select alternatives for Web architecture or technologies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Respond to user email inquiries, or set up automated systems to send responses.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Select programming languages, design tools, or applications.
tasks.rationale: Software coding, programming, or application development task highly susceptible to automated generation.

tasks.text: Write and edit technical documentation for digital interface products and designs, such as user manuals, testing protocols, and reports.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Write supporting code for Web applications or Web sites.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
